purpose: Verify full framework request assembly after a native API tool call and tool result, not only renderer behavior.
result_summary: OpenAIChatRenderer correctly renders stored ToolResultPayload as role:'tool', but the existing tool-continuation event path also appends an additional role:'user' message containing aggregated tool-result text before the next provider request.

renderedPayload.content:
The following tool executions have completed. Please analyze their results and decide the next course of action.

Tool: run_bash (ID: call_abc123)
Status: Success
Result:
total 8
-rw-r--r-- README.md

observed_extra_message.reason: ToolResultEventHandler dispatches SenderType.TOOL AgentInputUserMessage; UserInputMessageEventHandler builds LLMUserMessage; LLMRequestAssembler.prepareRequest always appends the incoming LLMUserMessage as MessageRole.USER.
